sentences.text: The movie plot was about a group of scientists who feared protestors might [abduct] their test gorilla..
The teacher’s directions were a little [ambiguous], so half the class started drawing while the other half started writing.
The pitcher started his motion but stopped suddenly, causing the umpire to call a [balk] and let the runner move to second base.
The two kingdoms finally signed a [compact] promising that they would help each other during times of trouble.
Before we decided on a theme for the school dance, the student council had to [confer] with the principal.
A white tip on the end of its tail is a distinct [earmark] that helps us tell our dog apart from the others in the park.
After swimming in the [frigid] lake water, we all scrambled out to wrap ourselves in warm, fuzzy towels.
A simple shovel is a very useful [implement] when you are trying to dig a hole for a new tree.
The damage caused by the giant storm was [incalculable] because so many homes and trees were affected.
It is [indisputable] that Sarah is the fastest runner in our grade since she has won every race this year.
During the summer, the athletes went through [intensive] training to prepare for the championship game.
You have to [maneuver] the remote-control car carefully to get it through the obstacle course without crashing.
The detective realized the broken engine wasn't an accident, but an act of [sabotage] meant to stop the train.
We had to turn back from our hike because we only had a [scant] amount of water left in our bottles.
The [stealthy] ninja moved across the wooden floor so quietly that not even the sleeping dog woke up.
The [strapping] lifeguards worked together to pull the heavy rescue boat onto the sandy shore.
The [strident] sound of the alarm clock echoed through the room, making it impossible to stay asleep.
If you give a small business enough support, it will [thrive] and provide many jobs for the community.
The explorers were amazed by the [titanic] size of the canyon, which stretched for hundreds of miles.
The knight made a [valiant] effort to protect the castle from the fire-breathing dragon.
